title: Yellow Marines fall in provincial cup final
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS  - Oriented Birds FC, popularly known as the Yellow Marines, saw their dream of reaching the Western Cape Provincial Nedbank Cup final come to an end after suffering a 4-1 defeat against Trinitarians AFC on Sunday afternoon, 11 January.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Oriented Birds FC, popularly known as the Yellow Marines, saw their dream of reaching the Western Cape Provincial Nedbank Cup final come to an end after suffering a 4-1 defeat against Trinitarians AFC on Sunday afternoon, 11 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The thrilling WC Regional Nedbank Cup final was played at Kwanokuthula Stadium, the home ground of the Plett-based outfit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds had come into the final with confidence after edging City Killers FC 1-0 in the semi-finals.","html":"The Birds had come into the final with confidence after edging City Killers FC 1-0 in the semi-finals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Trinitarians AFC, meanwhile, booked their place in the final by comfortably beating Kleinmond Young Stars FC 2-0.","html":"Trinitarians AFC, meanwhile, booked their place in the final by comfortably beating Kleinmond Young Stars FC 2-0."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The tournament featured regional champions Oriented Birds FC (Eden), Trinitarians AFC (Cape Town), Kleinmond Young Stars FC (Overberg), City Killers FC (Cape Winelands) and Prince Valley FC (Central Karoo)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oriented Birds started the final at a high tempo, pushing for an early breakthrough and putting the visitors under pressure. However, Trinitarians showed composure, patiently building their play through midfield and absorbing the early attacks.","html":"Oriented Birds started the final at a high tempo, pushing for an early breakthrough and putting the visitors under pressure. However, Trinitarians showed composure, patiently building their play through midfield and absorbing the early attacks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their discipline paid off as they struck twice in the first half, taking a commanding 2-0 lead into the break. The second half saw increased urgency from the home side, who kept the ball on the ground and searched for a way back into the match.","html":"Their discipline paid off as they struck twice in the first half, taking a commanding 2-0 lead into the break. The second half saw increased urgency from the home side, who kept the ball on the ground and searched for a way back into the match."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Their efforts were rewarded when they pulled one goal back to make it 2-1. Trinitarians responded by tightening their defence and pressing higher up the field, eventually scoring a third goal to regain control. A late fourth goal sealed a convincing 4-1 victory for the Cape Town side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Speaking after the match, experienced Oriented Birds player Melisizwe Duda admitted that Trinitarians were simply better on the day.","html":"Speaking after the match, experienced Oriented Birds player Melisizwe Duda admitted that Trinitarians were simply better on the day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He noted that while the Birds created several chances, poor finishing and conceding soft goals made it difficult to recover.","html":"He noted that while the Birds created several chances, poor finishing and conceding soft goals made it difficult to recover."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Trinitarians AFC will now face the Safa Western Cape ABC Motsepe League Nedbank Cup winners in the WC Provincial final, with the champions earning a place in the National Nedbank Cup last 32.","html":"Trinitarians AFC will now face the Safa Western Cape ABC Motsepe League Nedbank Cup winners in the WC Provincial final, with the champions earning a place in the National Nedbank Cup last 32."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oriented Birds FC goalkeeper Zakhe Xhotho on the ball. Photo: Zama Gagu","html":"Oriented Birds FC goalkeeper Zakhe Xhotho on the ball. Photo: Zama Gagu"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
